case_for: Cooper has shown big-play ceiling this season, including a 27.6-point explosion in week 3, proving he can clear 12 points when targets and matchup align
case_against: His recent floor is extremely volatile and low, with three of his last four games (3.6, 4.1, 7.5) falling well under the threshold, and the pregame projection of 7.5 points suggests a difficult matchup or reduced role
